differential_diagnoses: Xerophthalmia due to severe Vitamin A deficiency
Multiple micronutrient deficiencies (Vitamin C, D, B12, Zinc)
Autoimmune optic neuritis (less likely given systemic findings)
next_steps: Measure serum Vitamin A (retinol), Retinol Binding Protein (RBP), and other fat-soluble vitamins (D, E, K)
Immediate high-dose therapeutic Vitamin A supplementation as per WHO protocols for xerophthalmia
Complete blood count, comprehensive metabolic panel, and iron studies to assess for systemic malnutrition and anemia
Ophthalmology consult for evaluation of potential corneal ulceration and monitoring for recovery
Multidisciplinary nutrition and pediatric feeding therapy consultation to address severe avoidant/restrictive food intake
Formal vision assessment and support services registration
